recent_excerpts: BHIS released a cloud security guide covering IAM misconfigurations, shared responsibility gaps, and logging blind spots — essential reading for teams securing AWS, Azure, or GCP…
Elastic Security XDR now correlates endpoint telemetry with cloud and network data, enabling analysts to trace multi-stage attacks across hybrid environments in a single query…
ESET warns that misconfigured cloud VMs—overprivileged IAM roles, exposed management ports, and unpatched OS images—create systemic security gaps across enterprise environments.
